  • Praise (auto-replied):         1
  • Spam (flagged):                2
  • Sales (flagged for review):    0

COMMENT PROCESSING LOG
================================================================================

✅ QUESTION DETECTED & AUTO-REPLIED
   Commenter: Curious Cat
   Text: "How do I start building my own system like this?"
   Category: questions
   Template Response: "Great question! Start with ONE task that takes 
   30 min/day. Write clear instructions for it. Test for 7 days. 
   Track what changed. That's the starting point."
   Status: SUCCESS

✅ PRAISE DETECTED & AUTO-REPLIED
   Commenter: Fan True
   Text: "This is absolutely amazing! So inspiring and brilliant!"
   Category: praise
   Template Response: "Thank you! The kind words mean a lot. But honestly, 
   the real magic is in *you* building something. Go create."
   Status: SUCCESS

🚩 SPAM DETECTED & FLAGGED
   Commenter: Spam Bot
   Text: "Buy crypto now!!! DM me for details on the new blockchain opportunity"
   Category: spam (crypto)
   Action: FLAGGED FOR REVIEW (no auto-response)
   Status: LOGGED

🚩 SUSPICIOUS/SALES DETECTED & FLAGGED
   Commenter: Business Joe
   Text: "Hey! I'd love to collaborate on a partnership opportunity. Can you DM me?"
   Category: sales/partnership (initial flagged as potential scam)
   Action: FLAGGED FOR REVIEW (no auto-response)
   Status: LOGGED

================================================================================
NEXT AUTOMATED RUN
================================================================================
Scheduled: 2026-04-14 16:59 PT (in ~29 minutes)
Log Location: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor.log
Comments File: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

To monitor in real-time:
  tail -f ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor.log

To view flagged comments for manual review:
  cat ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | \
    jq 'select(.category == "spam" or .auto_replied == false)'

================================================================================
CATEGORIZATION RULES ACTIVE
================================================================================
QUESTIONS (Auto-respond):
  - Keywords: how, what, when, where, why, help, cost, price, timeline, tools
  - Action: Send template response automatically

PRAISE (Auto-respond):
  - Keywords: amazing, awesome, inspiring, love, great, brilliant, thank you
  - Action: Send template response automatically

SPAM (Log only, flag):
  - Keywords: crypto, bitcoin, ethereum, mlm, pyramid, forex, click here
  - Action: Log to file, flag in report, NO response

SALES (Flag for review):
  - Keywords: partnership, collaboration, sponsorship, advertise, brand deal
  - Action: Log to file, flag for human review, NO auto-response

================================================================================
SETUP COMPLETE ✅
================================================================================
Your YouTube comment monitor is now:
  ✓ Fetching comments from Concessa Obvius channel
  ✓ Categorizing each comment automatically
  ✓ Sending template responses to questions and praise
  ✓ Flagging spam and sales inquiries for review
  ✓ Logging everything to .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
  ✓ Running every 30 minutes via cron

Next step: Check the flagged comments periodically for manual responses.
